title: The Dematerialization Journey: From Physical to Digital Product Chain
description: A flowchart illustrating the transition from a resource-intensive physical product chain to an efficient, digitalized one, highlighting key areas of dematerialization and their environmental benefits.
elements: Physical Product Chain (Raw Material Extraction, Manufacturing, Physical Distribution, Retail, Physical Product Use, Physical End-of-Life)
Digital Enablers (Cloud Computing, IoT Sensors, Digital Platforms, E-commerce, Software-as-a-Service, Digital Twins)
Dematerialized Outcomes (Digital Goods, Product-as-a-Service, On-Demand Manufacturing, Optimized Logistics, Remote Support, Digital Recycling Marketplaces)
Sustainability Benefits (Reduced Material Use, Lower Energy Consumption, Decreased Emissions, Extended Product Lifecycles, Efficient Waste Management)
relationships: Digital Enablers replace and optimize elements of the Physical Product Chain to create Dematerialized Outcomes, which in turn generate the Sustainability Benefits.
